steps.assistant_content_head:
I'll build a responsive academic course catalog page for Nexus University according to the specifications.

First, I'll create the HTML file with all the required elements and styling.

tool_calls.name: write_file
tool_calls.content_head:
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
    <meta charset="UTF-8">
    <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
    <title>Nexus University - Computer Science Course Cata

steps.assistant_content_head: I'll now render the HTML page at 1920x1080 viewport using a headless browser and verify the result.

tool_calls.name: bash
tool_calls.command: python3 -c "from playwright.sync_api import sync_playwright; p=sync_playwright().start(); b=p.chromium.launch(); pg=b.new_page(viewport={'width':1920,'height':1080}); pg.goto('file://' + __import__('o

steps.assistant_content_head: I'll now examine the rendered screenshot to verify if the page meets all the specifications.

I can see that the page is rendering correctly with all the required elements:

1. Header with "Nexus University" on the left and search bar on the right
2. Navigation bar with Colleges, Faculty, Resources, and Contact links
3. Hero banner with "Computer Science Course Catalog — Spring 2025" text
4. Course cards in a grid layout (3 per row on desktop)
5. Sidebar with filter options for Level, Depa

steps.assistant_content_head: I'll now examine the rendered screenshot to verify if the page meets all the specifications.

I can see that the page is rendering correctly with all the required elements, but I need to verify if all the specific styling requirements are met. Let me check the details:

1. The hero banner background should be a gradient from #0d1b3d to #1e3a8a, but it appears to be solid blue in the screenshot.
2. The course cards should have a 1px #ddd border and 12px border-radius - this looks correct.
